trending_videos.title: Scary Movie | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Marlon Wayans, Shawn Wayans, Anna Faris, Regina Hall
trending_videos.description:
We’re baaaaaack. Watch the official trailer for the new #ScaryMovie - only in theatres JUNE 5. 

Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer (“Ghostface”), the Core Four are back in the killer’s crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe. Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”), and Regina Hall (“Brenda”) reunite in Scary Movie alongside returning favorites and fresh faces to slash through reboots, remakes, requels, prequels, sequels, spin-offs, elevated horror, origin stories, anything with the word legacy in it, and every “final chapter” that absolutely isn’t final. Nothing is sacred. No trope survives. ​Every line gets crossed. The Wayans are back to cancel the Cancel Culture.

Connect with #ScaryMovie Online:
Website: https://www.scarymovie.film
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/scarymovie/
X: https://x.com/ScaryMovie
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ScaryMovie
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@scarymovie
Threads: https://w

trending_videos.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
trending_videos.description: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis; "The Story" captures the voices that need to be heard and the people at the center of every history-shaping moment.

trending_videos.title: Apex Legends x Gundam Event Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Two Legendary universes collide as Gundam hits the Outlands March 10, bringing iconic weapons, Gundam-inspired cosmetics, and a reborn Broken Moon. Step into the endless waltz and fight with the power of a Gundam!

Get more info: https://www.ea.com/games/apex-legends/news/apex-gundam-event

Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play* battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PC via EA App, Epic Games Store and Steam: http://x.ea.com/57366.

Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710
Follow us on X: https://twitter.com/playapex
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/
Follow us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@playapex/

Credits:
Production Company: Electronic Arts, Respawn Entertainment, CG by Brunch Studio, Gameplay capture & edit by Dark Burn Creative
Sound Design and Mix: Respawn Entertainment & Mass

trending_videos.title: Honest Trailers | A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
trending_videos.description:
Just when we’d sworn off George R.R. Martin’s Game of Thrones universe…A Knight of The Seven Kingdoms comes along and drags us back in! Enjoy 6 tightly crafted episodes of high-impact jousting, lovable oaf shenanigans, and the most disgusting depiction of the human body since yo mamma’s bathroom mirror.

Voice Narration: Jon Bailey the EPIC VOICE GUY (@epicvoiceguy on all socials)
Title Design: Robert Holtby
Written by: Spencer Gilbert and Lon Harris
Produced by: Spencer Gilbert
Edited by: Kevin Williamsen
Post-Production Manager: Emin Bassavand
Manager, Video Operations: Tiffany Tse
Post-Production Specialist: Rebecca Castaneda
VP Content: Max Dionne

#honesttrailers #entertainment #parody #trailer #aknightofthesevenkingdoms #gameofthrones #dunk #egg

trending_videos.title: Fuerza Regida - Marlboro Rojo (LETRA)
trending_videos.description:
🍺 Si te gustó la rola, no olvides suscribirte, dejar tu like y compartirla con los compas.

🍻 Sobre la canción / el video:
“Marlboro Rojo” de Fuerza Regida es un corrido con esa vibra cruda y directa que caracteriza al grupo. Con una narrativa intensa, referencias al estilo de vida callejero y una producción moderna que mezcla regional mexicano con sonidos actuales, la canción transmite una energía desafiante y auténtica. 🔥🚬

Fuerza Regida continúa consolidándose como uno de los máximos exponentes del movimiento bélico y los corridos modernos, llevando su sonido a nuevas audiencias alrededor del mundo.

📲 Redes sociales del artista:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fuerzaregida

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/fuerzaregidaoficial

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@fuerzaregida

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@FuerzaRegida

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/fuerza-regida/1212

trending_videos.title: SCARY MOVIE 6 Official Trailer (2026) Marlon Wayans
trending_videos.description:
The parody franchise returns in Scary Movie 6 (2026).

Watch the official trailer featuring Marlon Wayans as the iconic comedy series takes aim at modern horror films once again. Packed with outrageous satire, unexpected cameos, and classic slapstick chaos, the sixth installment revives one of the most recognizable parody brands in film.

🔥 Horror parody returns
🔥 Marlon Wayans back in action
🔥 2026 comedy sequel

themes.insight: Interest in horror-comedy films, particularly the 'Scary Movie' franchise, is high. Content related to upcoming movies and breakdowns of trailers is engaging viewers.

themes.insight: Cross-genre collaborations in gaming (e.g., Apex Legends with Gundam) are capturing attention. Gamers also enjoy unique gameplay experiences, such as horror-themed games.
News and political commentary remain a staple for engaging a specific audience demographic.
Music content, particularly lyrics videos, continues to attract viewers. This indicates a trend towards visually enhanced music experiences.
Live sports coverage and highlights are consistently popular, suggesting a strong audience base for sports content.

top_channels.insight: Major film studios like Paramount Pictures continue to leverage YouTube for promoting upcoming releases, attracting large audiences.
Established news channels maintain a presence on YouTube, providing a platform for reaching digital audiences.
Gaming channels, particularly those associated with popular franchises like Apex Legends, engage fans through updates and event announcements.

insights.recommendation: Create content that explores the horror-comedy genre, including skits, reviews, and fan theories.
Develop content around cross-genre gaming collaborations, including event coverage and behind-the-scenes looks.
Produce visually-rich music content, such as animated lyric videos and artist collaborations, to captivate music fans.
